_description: Final estimates -- Brazil vs Norway R16 2026-07-05

questions.question: Will Vinícius Júnior (Brazil) score a goal (excluding own goals) in regulation (90 minutes + stoppage time)?
questions.note: Market mid=0.3775. Scored in 3/4 games, but the one blank was against Japan, his toughest opponent to date -- modest nudge up, not full trust of the 75% raw group-stage rate.

questions.question: Will Erling Haaland (Norway) score a goal (excluding own goals) in regulation (90 minutes + stoppage time)?
questions.note: Market mid=0.4098. Scored in literally every appearance this tournament (3/3), including the R32 knockout game -- real regime coverage, meaningful bump above market.

questions.question: Will Martin Ødegaard (Norway) score or assist a goal (excluding own goals) in regulation (90 minutes + stoppage time)?
questions.note: Market mid=0.2542. Assisted in all 3 games played (100%), but none against opposition near Brazil's quality -- modest bump only, not full trust given the untested-regime caution.

questions.question: Will Matheus Cunha (Brazil) have 1 or more shots on target in regulation (90 minutes + stoppage time)?
questions.note: Market mid=0.5652. Matches his record as first-choice CF (SOT in 3 of his 3 starts).

questions.question: Will Brazil advance to the quarterfinals?
Will the match be decided by a penalty shootout?
Will the match finish with exactly 2 total goals in regulation (90 minutes + stoppage time)?
Will both teams score in regulation (90 minutes + stoppage time)?
Will Brazil have 6 or more corner kicks in regulation (90 minutes + stoppage time)?
questions.note: Exact market match, Over 5.5 corners mid=0.4925.

questions.question: Will there be 4 or more total cards shown in regulation (90 minutes + stoppage time)?
Will Norway have 4 or more shots on target in regulation (90 minutes + stoppage time)?
questions.note: Exact market match, Over 3.5 SOT mid=0.5779. Consistent with Norway's own SOT log (5,7,4,4) -- no reason to deviate from market.

questions.question: Will the match be tied at halftime?
Will the second half produce more goals than the first half in regulation (90 minutes + stoppage time)?
Will Brazil have 6 or more shots on target in regulation (90 minutes + stoppage time)?
questions.note: DELIBERATE Cluster-B discipline: market-fit (0.402) vs empirical (0.631) -- staying at market per WINNING_PATTERNS_SYNTHESIS.md's validated 0-for-5 track record on blending upward.

questions.question: Will both teams receive at least one card in regulation (90 minutes + stoppage time)?
